title: DOITEM 5 Pieces Rubber Snakes 120cm Fake Snake 75cm Plastic Snakes Realistic Snakes Multicolor Fake Snake for Garden Props to Keep Birds Away, Pranks
features: Quality: The fake snake are made of plastic rubber, 4 colors(red, brown, black, dark green), soft and durable elastic, realistic. Plastic snakes can provide endless laughter, and fun for your kids, family and friends.

Realistic Design: Our plastic snakes are designed with realistic snake pattern with bright colors. These fake rubber snakes can act as a good educational tool, cognitive toy or counting material for kids to enjoy learning wildlife reptile knowledge.

Package Includes: You will get 5 pieces of mixed pattern multicolor fake snake(1 fake round head snake toys about 120cm, 4 fake round head snake toys about 75cm). The plastic snakes for kids will be great stretchy toys for the pranks and party.
Fun Decoration: The toy snakes are perfect gifts for kids to have fun and relieve stress. Toy snakes for kids can be used in the garden to discourage birds or any other animals, like birds or mice.

Wide Application: The realistic rubber fake snake Toy not only can be gifts and game prizes for friends, children, students, etc. Plastic snakes to scare birds can also be suitable for garden, Halloween party favors, Halloween props, educational props, wildlife themed party, school classroom rewards, Easter baskets and so on.
